displayName: Cloud SQL connection-feil — prod main-api eller web-api

documentation.content:
Backend rapporterer DB-tilkoblings-feil (connection refused, timeout, auth-feil). Hele app-en er antagelig nede inntil dette er fikset.

Vanlige årsaker:
- Cloud SQL Auth Proxy ikke konfigurert riktig på Cloud Run
- DB ute av plass
- IAM-bruker for prod-runner mangler tilgang
- DB-instans pauset/slettet ved et uhell

Sjekk Cloud SQL-konsollen for instans-status og Cloud Run-logs for full stack trace.

conditions.displayName: DB connection-feil i prod Cloud Run-log

conditionMatchedLog.filter: resource.type="cloud_run_revision" AND (resource.labels.service_name="main-api" OR resource.labels.service_name="web-api") AND severity>=ERROR AND (textPayload:"ECONNREFUSED" OR textPayload:"ETIMEDOUT" OR textPayload:"database connection" OR textPayload:"Cloud SQL" OR jsonPayload.message:"connection refused" OR jsonPayload.message:"password authentication failed" OR textPayload:"password authentication failed")
